name: Grilled Shellfish Ceviche (Gc)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pounds medium shrimp, shelled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonreactive bowl, combine the scallops, salmon, shrimp, tomatoes, mango, onion, jalapeno, and lime juice.
2. Marinate, refrigerated, for 3 hours.
3. Remove from marinade and grill fish and shellfish, just long enough to get grill marks (30-60 seconds).
4. Cut all fish into a 1/2-inch dice.
5. Just before serving, drain off as much lime juice as possible from the fruit.
6. Add the cilantro, sugar, shellfish, and salmon.
7. Gently mix being careful not to break up the fruit and fish.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
